pokemon:bastiodon.name: Bastiodon
pokemon:bastiodon.summary: Any frontal attack is repulsed. It is a docile Pokémon that feeds on grass and berries.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Any frontal attack is repulsed. It is a docile Pokémon that feeds on grass and berries.
When they lined up side by side, no foe could break through. They shielded their young in that way.
When they lined up side by side, no foe could break through. They shielded their young in that way.
Any frontal attack is repulsed. It is a docile Pokémon that feeds on grass and berries.
When attacked, they form a wall. Their rock-hard faces serve to protect them from the attacks.
Its face is sturdy—as strong as diamond—and this hardness offers a very stable defense. Much about this species is still unknown, such as its natural habitat.
It lived in the same environments as Rampardos. Their fossils have been found together— seemingly from after they’d fought to the finish.
When they lined up side by side, no foe could break through. They shielded their young in that way.
When attacked, they form a wall with their shieldlike faces to protect their young.
When they lined up side by side, no foe could break through. They shielded their young in that way.
When attacked, they form a wall. Their rock-hard faces serve to protect them from the attacks.
While it can guard against any sort of attack from the front, it is left without recourse when attacked from behind.
This Pokémon is from roughly 100 million years ago. Its terrifyingly tough face is harder than steel.
The bones of its face are huge and hard, so they were mistaken for its spine until after this Pokémon was successfully restored.
When they lined up side by side, no foe could break through. They shielded their young in that way.
When they lined up side by side, no foe could break through. They shielded their young in that way.
When they lined up side by side, no foe could break through. They shielded their young in that way.
Any frontal attack is repulsed. It is a docile Pokémon that feeds on grass and berries.

loreSummary: Any frontal attack is repulsed. It is a docile Pokémon that feeds on grass and berries.

pokemon:shieldon.name: Shieldon
pokemon:shieldon.summary: It was generated from a fossil dug out of a layer of clay that was older than anyone knows. It has a sturdy face.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It was generated from a fossil dug out of a layer of clay that was older than anyone knows. It has a sturdy face.
It is outstandingly armored. As a result, it can eat grass and berries without having to fight.
It is outstandingly armored. As a result, it can eat grass and berries without having to fight.
A Pokémon that lived in jungles around 100 million years ago. Its facial hide is extremely hard.
It was generated from a fossil dug out of a layer of clay that was older than anyone knows. It has a sturdy face.
Much remains unknown about this Pokémon, as few have ever seen it. However, we know that it is calm and dislikes conflict, and it enjoys polishing its face against trees and rocks.
This Pokémon lived in primeval jungles. Few enemies would have been willing to square off against its heavily armored face, so it’s thought.
It habitually polishes its face by rubbing it against tree trunks. It is weak to attacks from behind.
It habitually polishes its face by rubbing it against tree trunks. It is weak to attacks from behind.
It is outstandingly armored. As a result, it can eat grass and berries without having to fight.
It was generated from a fossil dug out of a layer of clay that was older than anyone knows. It has a sturdy face.
Many fossils of this Pokémon have been found, but almost none have shown signs of damage to the face.
Although its fossils can be found in layers of primeval rock, nothing but its face has ever been discovered.
A mild-mannered, herbivorous Pokémon, it used its face to dig up tree roots to eat. The skin on its face was plenty tough.
It is outstandingly armored. As a result, it can eat grass and berries without having to fight.
It is outstandingly armored. As a result, it can eat grass and berries without having to fight.
It habitually polishes its face by rubbing it against tree trunks. It is weak to attacks from behind.
It was generated from a fossil dug out of a layer of clay that was older than anyone knows. It has a sturdy face.

loreSummary: It was generated from a fossil dug out of a layer of clay that was older than anyone knows. It has a sturdy face.
